subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, salt-worn near the coast, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp glows against the twilight sky, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex catching a cool blue-hour sheen and a warm horizon glint, tugged taut by the gusty wind; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood reflecting the cool blue twilight and a warm horizon glint
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A rolling coastal road intersection at dusk during blue hour under clear but gusty summer skies. The salt-sheened asphalt bears a painted white stop line and lane markings, with a low sea horizon and windswept grasses beyond the curb. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Cool blue ambient light fills the scene while a warm band lingers on the horizon, and the red lamp glows brightly against the deepening sky.

lighting.conditions: Dusk blue hour, clear with a warm horizon band
lighting.direction: Soft cool skylight from above, warm residual glow low on the seaward horizon
lighting.shadows: Weak, long, cool-toned shadows fading as light drops; grounding shade beneath the post and balloons
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool blue-hour ambient against a warm horizon band, under which the illuminated red lamp glows vividly and balloons catch a cool sheen

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the coastal road leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right against the sea horizon; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the glowing red lamp
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool blue-hour palette of deep blue sky, warm orange horizon band, glowing red lamp, and cool-sheened balloons
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tranquil, expansive, faintly whimsical from the wind-tossed festive balloons
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings, rolling coastline, and rounded clustered balloon shapes tugging in the wind

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, glowing red lamp, and overlapping wind-tugged green balloon

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the rolling coastal road at blue-hour dusk, approaching the intersection where the red light glows against the sea horizon and balloons tug in the gusty wind.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the glowing red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the wind-tossed balloons continue to bob against the fading horizon.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the coastal intersection at blue-hour dusk; the single traffic light displays a steady red against the deep-blue sky, with party balloons tied to the post tugging in the wind.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the glowing traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent against the horizon.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on salt-sheened asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping wind-tugged balloon is clearly framed against the twilight sky.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; balloons continue to bob in the coastal wind.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the wind-tossed balloons move as the horizon glow fades.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a rolling coastal road at blue-hour dusk toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red against the deep-blue sky and warm horizon, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post tugging in the gusty wind. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the wind-tossed balloons still bobbing as the last warm light fades on the sea horizon.
audio_description: Ambient coastal dusk sounds: gusty wind, distant surf, calling gulls, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Brisk rustle of wind-tugged balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
